ミレスガルドの侯爵家の令嬢という高貴な立場でありながら、<br>騎士としてもその:
Despite being a noble daughter of the Marquess household of
Milesgard, she is a talented woman who also excels as a knight.
騎士養成学校で首席かつ生徒会長を務めるその非凡さは、<br>前線基地でもまた、如:
Her extraordinary ability—as valedictorian and student council
president at the Knight Training Academy—is evident at the Frontline Base.
まとまりのない探索者たちを統率しているのはソフィア嬢であり、<br>実質的に彼女:
It is Lady Sophia who commands the unruly explorers, and rumors say
she's truly running the Frontline Base—but what is the truth...?
――ミレスガルド王都の新聞社による、<br>前線基地の特集記事より抜粋。:
—Excerpt from a feature article on the Frontline Base by a Milesgard
Royal Capital newspaper.
大穴を調査する前線基地の探索隊。<br>その一角で、兵士たちが険しい表情で語り合:
The Frontline Base expedition team was investigating the Abyss. In
one corner, soldiers were talking with grim expressions.
はぁ……やっぱ大穴探索の任務は神経がすり減るな。<br>おい、そろそろ景気づけに:
*sigh*... Figures the Abyss mission really wears on your nerves. Hey,
let's have a drink to liven things up!
そうね、シラフで大穴探索なんてできるかってのよ！<br>さ、カンパーイ！:
You said it! Like anyone can explore the Abyss sober! Come on,
cheers!
なんだよ、ソフィアの嬢ちゃん。<br>そんな険しい顔して……:
What's the matter, little lady Sophia? You've got such a grim
expression on your face...
なんだよ――じゃないわよ！<br>何を飲んでるの、あなたたち！: That's not "what's the matter"! What are you people drinking?!
もちろん酒よ酒！ ま、景気づけってやつね！: Booze, of course! Just a little morale booster, right?
お酒！？ 任務の真っ最中に、お酒ぇっ！？<br>私たちはこれから大穴の探索をおこ:
Alcohol! In the middle of a mission! We're about to set out for the
Abyss exploration! Do you even understand that?
やれやれ、騎士様ってのは真面目だなあ！<br>酒は凡人を勇者に変えてくれる魔法の:
Oh boy, you knights sure are serious! Booze is a magic potion that
turns ordinary folks into heroes! Right, everyone!
そうだそうだ！ 士気向上ってやつだ！ ガッハッハッ！！: That's right, that's right! It's all about boosting morale! Gahaha!
ソフィアの振るった木剣が、静かな空気を切り裂く。<br>白く艷やかな肌にわずかに:
Sophia's wooden sword cut the still air. With a faint sweat on her fair
skin, she held the follow-through and slowly returned to her stance.
それにしても今日も人が少ないわね。まったく、この基地の訓練は<br>本人の自主性:
Still, honestly, so few people today. This base's training relies too
much on individual initiative... Should I tell the Commander?
――いえ、まずは自分のことだわ。<br>剣を片付けたら、クールダウンに基地の周り:
No, first things first. Once I put away my sword, I will cool down with
a run around the base.
呟いて棚に木剣を片付けるソフィア。<br>その彼女の眼前に、手の平サイズの何かが:
Sophia muttered to herself as she placed her wooden sword on the
shelf. Then, something palm-sized dropped down right in front of her.
ぷぷぷぷ～～っ！<br>いくらなんでも驚きすぎでしょ～♪ だっさぁ～い♪: Pfft pfft pfft pfft! You're way too jumpy!♪ How lame!♪
なっ……ベ、ベリサ！？ まさか、これあなたが――！？: Wh—... V-Verisa! Wait, did you do this?
そ♪ いたずら、だ～いせ～いこ～♪: Yep!♪ Prank was a biiig success!♪
あなたねぇ～～っ！ いつもいつも、つまらないことして！<br>こんなことする暇が:
You...! Always pulling these silly stunts! If you have time for this, you
should be training!
ソフィアこそ、虫に耐性つける訓練した方がいいんじゃな～い？:
If anything, Sophia, maybe you should train to build up a resistance
to bugs?
えらーい騎士様なのに、クモのおもちゃごときに<br>きゃ～～！ なんて、可愛い悲:
For such a great knight, screaming 'Kyaa!' over a toy spider is pretty
pathetic, you know!♪
……内容に漏れはないわね。 <br>報告書はこれでよし、と。: ...No omissions there. The report is good, then.
ふう……この基地では書類仕事をしている時が <br>何より落ち着くかもしれないわ:
*sigh*... Maybe I feel most at ease when I am doing paperwork at this
base...
――ん？<br>なにかしら、この臭い……もしかして……煙……？: —Hm? What is that smell... Could it be... smoke...?
やっぱり宿舎に煙が広がってる！<br>火元は――ここね！:
Just as I thought, smoke is spreading in the barracks! The source
is—here!
ばん！ とソフィアが扉を押し開く。 <br>その先には――: Bam! Sophia pushed the door open. And there before her—
あれぇ？ ソフィア？<br>そんなに慌てて、どうしたの～？: Huh? Sophia? What's wrong? Are you in a rush?
あっ、もしかしてソフィアも焚き火であったまりに来たのっ？<br>いいよっ！ 一緒:
Oh! Did you come here to warm up by the campfire too? Sure! Let's
warm up together! ♪
ちっがぁ～～～～う！！<br>どうして部屋の中で呑気に火を焚いてるのよ！: That's SO not it! Why are you casually making a fire indoors!
え～？ ちょっと寒かったからだよ？: Ehh? Because I was a little cold?
当然と言わんばかりの顔ね……。<br>うっかり私が間違っているのかと思っちゃうわ:
You say that like it's the most obvious thing in the world... You almost
make me think I'm the one who's wrong...
あ、あのね……クルル……<br>いくら寒いからって建物の中で火を焚いちゃだめなの:
Um, listen, Kururu... No matter how cold it is, you can't just build a
fire inside a building, okay?
えぇー？<br>でも、寒い時は火を囲むのが一番だよ～？: Ehh? But when it's cold, sitting by a fire is the best, isn't it?
だからってこんなの、危ないでしょう？<br>もし建物に燃え広がったらどうするつも:
That doesn't make it safe! What if the flames spread and the whole
building catches fire?
大丈夫ー♪ ちゃんと下に石をしいて――<br>あっ。: It's fine! ♪ I put stones underneath—Oh.
燃え盛る焚き火が音を立てて崩れ落ち、<br>瞬く間に床全体へと火が燃え広がってい:
The blazing campfire collapsed with a crash, and in an instant, the
flames spread across the entire floor—!
言わんこっちゃない！<br>消火よ！ すぐに火を消しなさーいっ！: I told you so! Put it out! Put out the fire right now!
ドンッ！！！ と白く小さな拳が司令室の机を叩く。<br>華奢ながらも鍛えられた騎:
Bang! Her small white fist pounded the command room desk. Slender
but well-trained, the knight's arm trembled with rage.
ほんっとーにもう！ <br>いい加減にしなさい！: Seriously! That's enough! Get a grip!
顔を合わせた途端に怒られてもな。 <br>俺は何もした覚えがないんだが……:
You start yelling the moment you see me. I don't recall doing
anything...
何もしていないことが問題なのよ！ <br>あなた、司令官としてちゃんと働いている:
That's exactly the problem! Are you even doing your job as
Commander?
今は指揮の話じゃないわ！ <br>この基地のことよ！: This isn't about your command! It's about this whole base!
……？ 別に問題はないと思うが。 <br>士気は高いし、みんな楽しそうじゃないか:
Huh? I don't think there's any problem... Morale's high, and everyone
seems to be having fun, right?
楽しそうなだけでしょう！<br>それだけでは基地は成り立たないの！: They are just having fun! That alone is not enough to run a base!
兵士は作戦中にお酒を飲むし、精鋭部隊は訓練もせずにイタズラ三昧！<br>寒くなっ:
Soldiers drink on duty, the Elite Squad plays pranks instead of
training, and when it gets cold, they even light fires in the barracks.
まともな統制が取れていないわ！<br>司令官として何をしてるの！:
There is no discipline whatsoever! What are you doing as
Commander?!
統制が取れてないとは失礼じゃないか！<br>……と、言いたいところなんだが、なあ:
That's pretty harsh, saying there's no discipline! ...I'd like to say
that, but...
あはは……確かに皆さん、少しだけ自由ですからね。: Ahaha... They are a bit too relaxed, aren't they?
しかしずっと真面目にやっていても疲れるだけだろう。 <br>多少は肩の力を抜くこ:
But if you're always too serious, you'll just burn out. You need to cut
loose every now and then, right?
ソフィアもそうやって気を張っているとストレスがたまるだけだぞ。<br>もうちょっ:
Sophia, if you're always so tense, you'll just get stressed out. Why
don't you loosen up a bit?
ストレスの原因が何を言ってるの！ <br>知ってるのよ、司令官！:
You are the cause of my stress, and yet you tell me to relax? I know
all about it, Commander!
兵士はあなたもお酒を飲みに来るって言っていたわよ！ <br>ベリサにおもちゃのク:
The soldiers told me you join them for drinks! And you gave Verisa
that toy spider, did you not?
クルルだって あなたと焚き火で魚を焼くって言っていたんだから！ <br>サボりに:
And Kururu said she is going to grill fish with you over a campfire!
You are slacking off left and right!
い、いやあ、やはり司令官として<br>部下とのコミュニケーションは重要だからな？:
W-well, as Commander, communication with subordinates is important,
right?
そんなものでごまかされると思ってるのかしら！？: Do you really think you can brush me off with that!
軍に必要なのは規律！ 規範！ 倫理！ <br>このままじゃこの前線基地は無法地帯:
What the military needs is discipline! Standards! Ethics! At this rate,
this Frontline Base will become a lawless zone!
そ、そんな大げさな……: Th-that's a bit over the top...
規律の乱れた組織は絶対に成果なんて出せない！ <br>そしていつか大きな事故に繋:
An undisciplined organization can never achieve results! Someday, it
will cause a major accident! To enforce order, we must act now!
あなたがやらないなら――私がこの基地の規律を正すわ！ <br>前線基地の運用は私:
If you will not do it, then I will restore discipline to this base myself!
Leave the management of the Frontline Base to me!
――かくして、ソフィアの前線基地健全化作戦が始まったのだった。: —And so, Sophia's Frontline Base Reformation Operation began.
